title: Clear/Fix SOS Button Display Issue on Home Page

requirements.summary: Remove or hide the SOS button from the home page so it no longer appears in the UI
acceptanceCriteria: The SOS button is not visible on the home page by default.
No pulsing SOS button or SOS emergency section is rendered unless the correct display condition is explicitly met.
The home page loads without any SOS button appearing unexpectedly.
No console errors or broken layout related to the SOS button section.

file_operations.description: Remove or conditionally hide the SOS button section that appears between the welcome banner and quick-action links. Ensure the conditional rendering logic (if any) prevents the button from showing when no SOS banner image is uploaded or when the user is not properly authenticated. Clear any state or logic that causes the SOS button to display unexpectedly. Verify the component's layout remains intact after removing the SOS section, with proper spacing between the welcome banner and quick-action links.

Review and update the SOSButton component to ensure it only renders when explicitly required conditions are met (e.g., when called from authorized contexts or with explicit props). Add safety checks to prevent unexpected rendering. If the component is being used elsewhere in the app beyond the home page, ensure those usages remain functional.
